name: neuralrelay
description: Structured handoff protocols for multi-agent pipelines. Passes typed JSON contracts between agents so downstream stages skip redundant codebase exploration.

agents.name: ba-agent
agents.description: Business Analyst — analyzes tasks and produces structured requirements handoffs

agents.name: dev-agent
agents.description: Senior Developer — implements features and produces dev-to-test handoffs with coverage gaps and believed properties

agents.name: test-agent
agents.description: Test Engineer — priority-ordered testing focused on coverage gaps, produces test-to-review handoffs

agents.name: review-agent
agents.description: Tech Lead Reviewer — reviews code and handoff chain quality, produces final review verdicts

agents.name: process-manager
agents.description: Pipeline Orchestrator — manages agent execution, handoff validation, rework loops, and token tracking

agents.name: security-agent
agents.description: Security Reviewer — focused security audit for authentication, injection, secrets exposure, and dependency vulnerabilities

commands.name: neuralrelay init
commands.description: Initialize NeuralRelay in the current project

commands.name: neuralrelay start
commands.description: Start a full pipeline run with a task description

commands.name: neuralrelay status
commands.description: Show current pipeline status and token usage

commands.name: neuralrelay quick
commands.description: Run a lightweight 2-stage pipeline (dev + test) for simple tasks

commands.name: neuralrelay chain
commands.description: Visualize a completed handoff chain in human-readable format

commands.name: neuralrelay report
commands.description: Generate cost and quality analytics across pipeline runs

skills.name: handoff-protocol
skills.description: Structured Handoff Protocol knowledge — auto-loaded to teach agents how to write and consume typed handoffs
